[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000100000 2
1 0110111111 8
2 0001011011 5
3 0001101000 3
4 0010010110 4
5 0010000010 2
6 0110101100 5
7 0101101110 6

01 1011010011 6

67 1101101001 6
70 1111111111 a
